name: EVIL
short_description: You are a priest who has gone into the dark forest for a final battle against evil.
detailed_description:
One by one, people began to disappear in the forest.
The town's authorities are possessed by a mysterious evil.
There is nowhere to look for help.
Armed with his faith in the Lord God and a cross, a lone priest sets out into the cursed forest for the final battle against evil.
You are this priest.

Go in search of the ultimate evil!
Cast out evil spirits with the word of God and the cross.
Prepare for the horror that lurks in this forest.

Evil is a story-driven horror adventure game.

- Cleanse the objects of filth;
- Exorcise evil spirits;
- Explore atmospheric locations;
